title: taraxacum perfiljevii
intro: Taraxacum perfiljevii, also known as the perfiljev's dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a type of perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum perfiljevii include treating digestive issues, reducing blood pressure, and alleviating symptoms of colds and fever. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be consumed raw in salads or as a vegetable.
